news.paragraph: Traders should consider the conflicting macro signals affecting long-term treasury bonds. While seasonal tailwinds are reportedly aligning for 30 and 10-year treasuries, a stronger-than-expected April jobs report has raised concerns that the Federal Reserve may keep interest rate cuts on hold. This tension between seasonal setups and employment-driven Fed policy provides a complex backdrop for TLT options.
